question: Did I read the full paper (or only the input kind I was given)?
Am I clear about the reading mode in the hero badge?
Have I marked every interpretive claim with an evidence label?
Did I avoid pretending that I read Pass 2 / Pass 3 content I did not actually read?
Have I replaced every [DRAFT] placeholder in this paper_reading.json?
Do I know what I would need to do to upgrade reading_mode to full_text?
Have I documented the resolution trail (input → canonical paper → body) in intake_quality?
Did I check that claims only use [Author claim] / [Uncertain] / [Needs verification] when the body is not available?
